ephemeral_worker_tasks.context: Scope: auth. Allowed edits: Only files required for scope: auth. Purpose: parallel scoped implementation lane; execute in safe waves, not all at once. Proof expectations: each lane has non-overlapping scope; integration pass checks conflicts; focused tests run after merge; independent reviewer/tester checks evidence; final answer includes review verdict; test command/output or explicit reason tests were not run; final summary names touched scopes: auth, billing. Dry-run adapter contract only; do not launch external workers or mutate runtime configuration.
ephemeral_worker_tasks.goal: Act as the builder lane for objective: Refactor auth and billing modules, then run tests. Selected worker pattern: module-swarm. Deliver changed files, implementation summary, and validation evidence.

ephemeral_worker_tasks.goal: Act as the builder lane for objective: Refactor auth and billing modules, then run tests. Selected worker pattern: module-swarm. Deliver changed files, implementation summary, and validation evidence.

ephemeral_worker_tasks.context: Scope: auth, billing. Allowed edits: Only files required for scope: auth, billing. Purpose: merge/check lane outputs after all waves. Proof expectations: each lane has non-overlapping scope; integration pass checks conflicts; focused tests run after merge; independent reviewer/tester checks evidence; final answer includes review verdict; test command/output or explicit reason tests were not run; final summary names touched scopes: auth, billing; integration summary names merged scopes and unresolved risks. Dry-run adapter contract only; do not launch external workers or mutate runtime configuration.
ephemeral_worker_tasks.goal: Act as the integrator lane for objective: Refactor auth and billing modules, then run tests. Selected worker pattern: module-swarm. Deliver merged outcome summary, touched scopes, and integration risks.

ephemeral_worker_tasks.context: Scope: auth, billing. Allowed edits: Only files required for scope: auth, billing. Purpose: independent review/test verification. Proof expectations: each lane has non-overlapping scope; integration pass checks conflicts; focused tests run after merge; independent reviewer/tester checks evidence; final answer includes review verdict; test command/output or explicit reason tests were not run; final summary names touched scopes: auth, billing; independent verdict with explicit regressions or none. Dry-run adapter contract only; do not launch external workers or mutate runtime configuration.
ephemeral_worker_tasks.goal: Act as the reviewer lane for objective: Refactor auth and billing modules, then run tests. Selected worker pattern: module-swarm. Deliver independent review verdict, regressions found, and proof check.

lanes.runtime_hint: ephemeral reviewer or independent review worker

safety_notes: Runtimes execute; this package only selects/adapts worker patterns.
Dry-run only: this execution plan renders worker and task specs but does not execute them.
Reserved --execute flag fails closed until explicit execution support is approved.
Module-swarm execution lanes are logical decomposition lanes; runtime adapters decide how to map them.
Module-swarm scale policy: 2 requested lanes as decomposition count, 2 max active lanes, 1 waves.
